creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #6)

That's weird.  qt5-qwt6 installs /usr/local/lib/qt5/pkgconfig/Qt5Qwt6.pc, so the pkg-config file is there.  Did you not find it?

Please again: make sure every patch is tested before you submit it.  Test each patch with Poudriere, ideally on multiple architectures and multiple OS versions.  Even if you just change one little thing, retest the patch.  You are wasting a lot of time if you submit untested patches.  Your apologies do not return the time you have wasted; just make sure you have tested everything you submit.
